# Ernest Of Gaia — AI Coaching

Ernest Of Gaia is a local AI coaching business serving Pacific City to
Portland Metro, Oregon.

## Contact
- Phone: 503-664-0546
- Email: eog@ernestofGaia.xyz
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ernestofgaia
- X: https://x.com/ErnestOfGaia
- Website: https://ernestofgaia.xyz
- Machine-readable data: https://ernestofgaia.xyz/api/eogbook

## Services
- Tier 1: Foundations — AI Starter ($75/session, 60 min, for beginners)
- Tier 2: The Workshop — AI Builder ($110/session, 75 min, most popular)
- Tier 3: Masterclass — AI Architect ($165/session, 90 min, by inquiry)
- Free Handshake Call (30 min, no commitment)

## About
Ernest Of Gaia helps individuals master AI tools through personalized,
holistic 1-on-1 coaching. Plain English, no jargon, no hype.

Tagline: "AI That Actually Works for Your Real Life"

## Coaching Information Architecture (EOGbook)
Full service details at: https://ernestofgaia.xyz/eogbook

Pages:
- Who Is Ernest: https://ernestofgaia.xyz/eogbook/who-is-ernest

- Get Started: https://ernestofgaia.xyz/eogbook/get-started

## Nonprofit Giveback Program
Every 12 hours of paid coaching earns one free AI coaching session for a
local Oregon nonprofit of the client's choice.

## Service Area
Pacific City, Oregon to Portland Metro, Oregon. Online coaching available.

## Coaching Plans
- Pay as you go (flexible, no commitment)
- Launch Plan: 3 months, 12 sessions
- Growth Plan: 6 months, 24 sessions, 5% off
- Transformation Plan: 9 months, 36 sessions, 10% off

## CTA
Schedule a free 30-minute call: text "AI coaching" to 503-664-0546
